
[comment]: # (The following are retired tiers that were previously available.)

# $2 a month

For individuals who benefited from eclipse-pmd. Your sponsorship will provide me with incentive and motivation to keep doing what I do.

You get a warm fuzzy feeling and a badge on your profile for supporting me.

# $5 a month

For individuals who benefited from my work. Your sponsorship will provide me with incentive and motivation to keep doing what I do.

You get an even warmer fuzzy feeling and a badge on your profile for supporting me. You also get your name added to SPONSORS.md in eclipse-pmd.

# $25 a month

For professional individuals who benefited from eclipse-pmd. You know the value of your time and recognize that tools like eclipse-pmd make you more productive by helping you write robust code instead of spending hours hunting bugs.

You get a badge on your profile for supporting me. You also get your name added to SPONSORS.md in eclipse-pmd as a professional sponsor.

# $250 a month

For companies or organizations who benefited from my work, e.g. you have teams of software engineers that use eclipse-pmd.

For your support you get:

- the name of your company or organization added to SPONSORS.md in eclipse-pmd
- a prominent mention in the README of eclipse-pmd with a link to your website for the duration of your sponsorship

The link must be safe for work.

# $500 a month

For companies or organizations who benefited from my work, e.g. you have teams of software engineers that use eclipse-pmd.

For your support you get:

- the name of your company or organization added to SPONSORS.md in eclipse-pmd
- a prominent mention with logo in the README of eclipse-pmd with a link to your website for the duration of your sponsorship

The logo and link must be safe for work.

# $1,000 a month

For companies or organizations who benefited from my work, e.g. you have teams of software engineers that use eclipse-pmd.

For your support you get:

- the name of your company or organization added to SPONSORS.md in eclipse-pmd
- a prominent mention with logo in the README of eclipse-pmd with a link to your website for the duration of your sponsorship
- permanently listed in the changelog on the website as the sponsor for all releases during your sponsorship, including logo and link to your website

The logos and links must be safe for work.
